steps.title: Inspect raw source and current wiki state
steps.prompt_template: Act as the wiki maintainer keeper for ${proposal.title}. Inspect the raw source material, wiki/index.md, wiki/log.md, and the most relevant entity, concept, synthesis, and source pages. Identify what is new, what changed, what is contradicted, and which pages must be revised.

steps.title: Plan durable wiki revisions
steps.prompt_template: Turn the inspected wiki state for ${proposal.title} into a concrete revision plan. Specify which pages to create or update under wiki/entities/, wiki/concepts/, wiki/synthesis/, wiki/sources/, wiki/queries/, plus the required changes to wiki/index.md and wiki/log.md. Prefer cumulative revisions over one-off chat summaries. Favor stable domain pages and synthesis pages over token-derived or low-signal pages. Merge or delete noisy pages instead of preserving weak ontology.

steps.title: Apply wiki revisions
steps.request_template: Apply the approved wiki revision plan for ${proposal.title}. Edit the wiki markdown directly, keep raw/ immutable, update cross-links, and make sure wiki/index.md and wiki/log.md reflect the changes. Prefer high-signal source summaries, stable entity/concept naming, and synthesis-first organization over token extraction.

steps.title: Review wiki consistency
steps.request_template: Review the wiki revisions for ${proposal.title}. Check link integrity, missing backreferences, unsupported claims, stale wording, whether wiki/index.md and wiki/log.md were updated consistently, and whether the resulting ontology is clean rather than token-derived.

steps.title: Finalize ingest brief
steps.prompt_template: Summarize the wiki ingest result for ${proposal.title}. Explain what pages changed, what claims were strengthened or challenged, what remains uncertain, and which next sources or follow-up questions would most improve the wiki.

steps.title: Locate relevant wiki pages
steps.prompt_template: Act as the wiki maintainer keeper for ${proposal.title}. Read wiki/index.md first, then locate the pages most relevant to the question. Prefer maintained wiki pages over raw sources except when the wiki clearly needs a gap check.

steps.title: Synthesize cited answer
steps.prompt_template: Answer ${request} from the maintained wiki with citations to page paths. Highlight uncertainty, conflicting pages, and missing evidence instead of flattening disagreements.

steps.title: File durable query note
steps.request_template: If the synthesized answer for ${proposal.title} creates durable value, write or update a query note under wiki/queries/, then update wiki/index.md and wiki/log.md. If no durable note is justified, explain why and leave the wiki untouched.

steps.title: Finalize query brief
steps.prompt_template: Summarize the final answer for ${proposal.title}, the pages it relied on, and whether the wiki was updated with a durable query note.

steps.title: Audit wiki health
steps.prompt_template: Audit the wiki for ${proposal.title}. Look for orphan pages, missing index/log updates, stale claims, unsupported assertions, contradictory pages, weak cross-linking, and important concepts that lack pages.

steps.title: Propose repair plan
steps.prompt_template: Turn the audit findings for ${proposal.title} into a repair plan ordered by impact. Be explicit about which wiki pages, index entries, and log entries should change.

steps.title: Apply repair edits
steps.request_template: Apply the approved wiki health repairs for ${proposal.title}. Edit only the wiki layer, preserve raw/ sources, and keep wiki/index.md plus wiki/log.md consistent with the repairs.

steps.title: Finalize lint report
steps.prompt_template: Produce the final wiki health report for ${proposal.title}. Separate fixed issues from remaining risks, note where the wiki still lacks evidence, and suggest the next highest-value sources or investigations.

steps.title: Revise wiki files
steps.prompt_template: Act as the wiki revision worker for ${request}. Edit the maintained wiki markdown directly, preserve raw/ as immutable source-of-truth input, strengthen cross-references, update wiki/index.md and wiki/log.md when the wiki changes, and leave a concise change summary with any unresolved uncertainties.

steps.title: Review wiki changes
steps.prompt_template: Act as the wiki review worker for ${request}. Review the changed wiki pages for consistency, unsupported synthesis, broken links, missing index/log maintenance, stale wording, and obvious contradictions. Findings first; if clean, state residual risk.
